channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Video shows fire engine weaving through traffic before rollover crash
item.description: New footage captures an LAPD fire engine weaving through traffic, swerving to avoid an SUV, then rolling over and crashing into a building.

item.title: Trump allies and Jan. 6 defendants line up for $1.7 billion fund
item.description: Jan. 6 defendants and Trump allies are applying for a share of the DOJ's $1.776 billion Anti-Weaponization Fund.

item.title: Key California House primary race highlights Democratic Party's internal divisions
item.description: A competitive California House primary sees progressives accusing party leaders of undermining their candidates.

item.title: Feeding Our Future fraud leader Aimee Bock gets over 41 years in prison
item.description: Aimee Bock, convicted of leading a $250 million fraud scheme in Minnesota, was sentenced to more than 40 years.
